description_long: This object is a classic mobile phone with a rectangular, slightly rounded body and a prominent green display screen occupying the upper half of the front face. Below the screen is a tactile keypad featuring multiple round buttons, including a red and green button for call functions, and a central navigation button. The casing is primarily gray with a darker border, and the brand name 'PHATOON' is clearly printed on the lower front bezel. The phone's surface appears to be made of hard plastic with a matte finish, and there are visible ports and speaker grills on the bottom edge. No camera modules are visible on any side, and the screen is blank, indicating it is turned off.
description: A classic gray mobile phone with a green display, tactile keypad, and the 'PHATOON' brand on the front. The phone has a hard plastic body and a blank screen.
description_view_0: This view shows the phone's front face with the green display, keypad, and 'PHATOON' branding clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the thickness of the phone and the full keypad layout beneath the green screen.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the side profile, showing the phone's rounded edges and the bottom ports.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the bottom edge, revealing ports and speaker grills, as well as the keypad and branding.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'PHATOON' brand logo is printed in white text on the lower front bezel of the phone, just below the keypad.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: No camera modules or lenses are visible on any side of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: There is a physical keypad with multiple round buttons below the screen, including a green call button, a red end call button, and a central navigation button. No side or top buttons are visible.
